description: You are a CAD operator on a university aerospace design team. The aerodynamics lead has provided a geometry specification for the new SunStrider T-200 solar tandem-wing UAV. Read the specification file at /home/ga/Desktop/tandem_uav_spec.txt carefully. Implement the complete tandem-wing aircraft configuration in OpenVSP from scratch based on the specification. The model should include a fuselage, a forward wing, an aft wing, and a vertical tail. Ensure the wings are spatially separated along the longitudinal (X) axis as specified, and the spans match the target sizes. Name the components descriptively. When finished, save the completed OpenVSP model to /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/tandem_wing_uav.vsp3.
